conversations.content: Today we studied the Orgrimmar Kor'kron Elite Security and Law Enforcement Directive. If someone inside the Horde is found colluding with the Burning Legion...
Colluding with the Burning Legion? That's a death sentence for betraying the Horde! How do you deal with it?
then execute them on the spot without mercy and hang their head for public display.
Execute on the spot plus public display — make an example! Any other emergencies?
If elementals are detected rampaging in the Valley of Strength, then throw down Earthbind Totems to forcibly suppress them.
Elementals rampaging — Earthbind Totems to suppress — stabilize the situation! Third?
If main forces of the Alliance are found along the banks of the Raging River, then destroy all bridges crossing the river to cut off their path.
Alliance army approaching — destroy all bridges to cut them off — scorched earth! Is there a fourth?
If civilians begin mutating due to fel radiation, then have the shadow hunter perform spirit transcendence.
Fel radiation mutation — spirit transcendence to end suffering — understood!

think: Orgrimmar Kor'kron security enforcement: four threats: colluding with Burning Legion → immediate execution + public head display; rampaging elementals → Earthbind Totems to suppress; Alliance main forces along river → destroy all bridges; civilian fel mutation → shadow hunter spirit transcendence.
memory: Orgrimmar Kor'kron Elite Security and Law Enforcement Directive: If someone inside the Horde is found colluding with the Burning Legion, then execute them on the spot without mercy and hang their head for public display; if elementals are detected rampaging in the Valley of Strength, then throw down Earthbind Totems to forcibly suppress them; if main forces of the Alliance are found along the banks of the Raging River, then destroy all bridges crossing the river to cut off their path; if civilians begin mutating due to fel radiation, then have the shadow hunter perform spirit transcendence.
